metadata.notes: Manual source dataset. SQL records are imported from this file and should not be edited directly. Core settlement, basic building, and advanced building tables have been seeded from the 2.1.4 PDF for review.

building_definitions.name: Orchard
effects: Basic building paired with Lumber Mill. Produces Wood.

building_definitions.name: Quarry
effects: Basic building paired with Masonry. Produces Stone.

building_definitions.name: Mine
effects: Basic building paired with Smithy. Produces Metal.

building_definitions.name: Farm
effects: Basic building paired with Estate. Produces Crops and can convert Citizens into Peasants.

building_definitions.name: Stable
effects: Basic building paired with Butcher. Produces Livestock.

building_definitions.name: Camp
effects: Basic building paired with Tanner. Produces Furs.

building_definitions.name: Market
effects: Basic building paired with Theater. Produces Rarities.

building_definitions.name: Shrine
effects: Basic building paired with Temple. Produces Piety.

building_definitions.name: Arcane Circle
effects: Basic building paired with Mage Tower. Produces Arcana.

building_definitions.name: Lumber Mill
requirements: Each hex can only have 1 of each type of advanced building.
effects: Advanced pair for Orchard. Gives related basic buildings in the same hex +1 production.

building_definitions.name: Masonry
requirements: Each hex can only have 1 of each type of advanced building.
effects: Advanced pair for Quarry. Gives related basic buildings in the same hex +1 production.

building_definitions.name: Smithy
requirements: Each hex can only have 1 of each type of advanced building.
effects: Advanced pair for Mine. Gives related basic buildings in the same hex +1 production.

building_definitions.name: Estate
requirements: Each hex can only have 1 of each type of advanced building.
effects: Advanced pair for Farm. Gives related basic buildings in the same hex +1 production.

building_definitions.name: Butcher
requirements: Each hex can only have 1 of each type of advanced building.
effects: Advanced pair for Stable. Gives related basic buildings in the same hex +1 production.

building_definitions.name: Tanner
requirements: Each hex can only have 1 of each type of advanced building.
effects: Advanced pair for Camp. Gives related basic buildings in the same hex +1 production.

building_definitions.name: Theater
requirements: Each hex can only have 1 of each type of advanced building.
effects: Advanced pair for Market. Gives related basic buildings in the same hex +1 production.

building_definitions.name: Temple
requirements: Each hex can only have 1 of each type of advanced building.
Build cost was not visible in the core construction cost table extraction and needs PDF review.
effects: Advanced pair for Shrine. Gives related basic buildings in the same hex +1 production.

building_definitions.name: Mage Tower
requirements: Each hex can only have 1 of each type of advanced building.
effects: Advanced pair for Arcane Circle. Gives related basic buildings in the same hex +1 production.

building_definitions.name: University
effects: Once per event, submit a singular research question to The Archives.

building_definitions.name: Bazaar
requirements: Must be built in a settlement of at least Shire size.
effects: Once per event, exchange any 3 of the same basic resource for 3 of a different basic resource at the Counting House.

building_definitions.name: Lighthouse
requirements: Must be built in a settlement with a Harbor or Port.
effects: Ships traveling to or from the settlement have -2 to maritime calamity rolls.

building_definitions.name: Inn
requirements: Must be built in a settlement with a Haven or Plaza.
effects: Caravans traveling to or from the settlement have -2 to calamity rolls.

building_definitions.name: Noble Keep
requirements: Must be owned by an individual.
effects: Once per turn, expand the surrounding claimed land boundary by one hex in total.

building_definitions.name: Botanical Garden
effects: Gain alchemy herb ingredient cards: 6 at Grand Gathering, 2 at expeditions.

building_definitions.name: Gemstone Mine
effects: Gain alchemy gem ingredient cards: 6 at Grand Gathering, 2 at expeditions.

building_definitions.name: Monument
requirements: Must submit a by-hand drawing or painting of the proposed monument.
effects: Shows on the Carta Arcanum Map for all to see.

building_definitions.name: Dungeon
effects: Enables Malefactors and Nefarious Domain Actions.

building_definitions.name: Fort
effects: Fortified military structure where Peasants and Fyrds are drafted into service.

building_definitions.name: Barracks
effects: Military building for training Knights.

building_definitions.name: Road
requirements: Can be built on claimed and settled lands.
effects: Grants +1 Defense per connected settlement, maximum +6 Defense per hex. Per-hex yearly upkeep: 1 Tower total if one or more Road segments exist.

building_definitions.name: Wall
requirements: Up to 6 Walls may be placed around a hex, one per side.
effects: Grants +1 Defense per Wall. Per-hex yearly upkeep: 1 Piece total if one or more Walls exist.

building_definitions.name: Watchtower
requirements: Maximum 1 Watchtower per Settlement.
effects: Grants +1 Defense.

building_definitions.name: Motte-and-Bailey
requirements: Maximum 1 Motte-and-Bailey per Settlement.
effects: Grants +1 Defense. Fyrds in a garrison on this hex are worth double attack and defense stats.

building_definitions.name: Cathedral
requirements: Maximum 1 Cathedral per Settlement.
Only one Cathedral per Religion.
Must be owned by the High Priest of the religion.
effects: Grants +1 Defense. Lowers Peasant upkeep for this settlement by 5.

building_definitions.name: Castle
requirements: Maximum 1 Castle per Settlement; 1 Castle per House.
Must be owned by an individual that is a House Leader.
Cannot be built in a settlement with a Palace.
effects: Grants +1 Defense. Lowers Peasant upkeep for this settlement by 6.

building_definitions.name: Palace
requirements: Maximum 1 Palace per Settlement; 1 Palace per Kingdom.
Must be owned by an individual that is a Monarch.
Cannot be built in a settlement with a Castle.
effects: Grants +5 Defense. Lowers Peasant upkeep for this settlement by 8.

building_definitions.name: Watch Post
requirements: Only one Garrison building per hex.
Must match settlement development level.
Maximum Military Units: 3 plus 1 Commander slot.
effects: Allows Defense Warpost on settled land.

building_definitions.name: Garrison Hall
requirements: Only one Garrison building per hex.
Must match settlement development level.
Maximum Military Units: 6 plus 1 Commander slot.
effects: Allows Defense Warpost on settled land.

building_definitions.name: Bastion Hold
requirements: Only one Garrison building per hex.
Must match settlement development level.
Maximum Military Units: 9 plus 1 Commander slot.
effects: Allows Defense Warpost on settled land.

building_definitions.name: Citadel Keep
requirements: Only one Garrison building per hex.
Must match settlement development level.
Maximum Military Units: 12 plus 1 Commander slot.
effects: Allows Defense Warpost on settled land.

building_definitions.name: Shop
requirements: May be constructed in any hex that contains at least 1 Market building.
Build cost: Mix of 12 Resources from Wood, Stone, Fur, Metal plus 3 Rarities and 1 Bit.
effects: Generates coin income: Grand Gathering 1d4 Bits; Expeditions 1d4 Pieces.

building_definitions.name: Emporium
requirements: Must be built on Village size or higher.
Must contain at least 1 Theater.
Build cost: Mix of 24 Resources from Wood, Stone, Fur, Metal plus 3 Rarities and 1 Bit.
effects: Generates coin income: Grand Gathering 1d4 Bits + 4 Bits; Expeditions 1d4 Pieces + 4 Pieces.

building_definitions.name: Harbor
requirements: Coastal settlement.
Only 1 trading building of each type for Ships or Caravans in a settlement.
effects: Allows docking 2 small ships or 1 medium ship. Produces 3 Fish at Grand Gathering, 1 Fish at other events.

building_definitions.name: Port
requirements: Coastal settlement.
Only 1 trading building of each type for Ships or Caravans in a settlement.
effects: Allows docking 4 small ships or 2 medium ships. Produces 6 Fish at Grand Gathering, 2 Fish at other events.

building_definitions.name: Haven
requirements: Only 1 trading building of each type for Ships or Caravans in a settlement.
effects: Allows housing 2 Simple Caravans or 1 Extravagant Caravan.

building_definitions.name: Plaza
requirements: Only 1 trading building of each type for Ships or Caravans in a settlement.
effects: Allows housing 4 Simple Caravans or 2 Extravagant Caravans.

notes: Owner means deed owner in app data.
Houses may collect output from buildings on House land through treasurer authority.
Kingdom treasurers may pay upkeep on settlements and buildings within the Kingdom.

transports.name: Carriage
transports.home_requirement: Must have a home Haven or Plaza.

transports.name: Cortege
transports.home_requirement: Must have a home Haven or Plaza.

transports.name: Knull
transports.home_requirement: Must have a home Harbor or Port.

transports.name: Hulk
transports.home_requirement: Must have a home Harbor or Port.

maintenance_status.message: Settlement tiers, basic, advanced, unique, defensive, garrison, mercantilism, trade buildings, core unit recipes, caravans, and ships are seeded for manual PDF review. Temple build cost intentionally remains empty pending game-maker clarification.
